extra_slides.purpose: 릴스 시작 2초 안에 시청자를 멈추게 하는 충격적 경고 메시지
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Center: ULTRA-BOLD extra-large white Korean text '고개 뒤로 젖히면 위험합니다' stacked vertically, maximum size, dominant hierarchy. Below headline: thin red #E63946 underline accent. Bottom third: small red rounded label '코피 응급처치' + white body text '99% 부모가 모르는 진실' compact sans-serif. Typography-focused, no illustrations. High contrast white on dark navy. Minimal modern emergency poster aesthetic. All text perfectly readable, ample negative space.

extra_slides.purpose: 고개를 뒤로 젖히는 잘못된 자세를 실사로 보여주는 경고 장면
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical photorealistic closeup. Young child 4-7 years tilting head backward dramatically, view from side angle. Child's hand holding tissue to nose. Motion blur effect on head tilt. Warm indoor lighting, soft focus background. Overlay: thick red X mark crossing the entire frame diagonally. Top-left corner: small red rounded label '절대 금지 ❌' white Korean text. Urgent documentary photography style. Natural skin tones, realistic fabric texture. Cinematic shallow depth of field. Professional medical educational photo aesthetic.

extra_slides.purpose: 올바른 자세인 고개 숙이기와 코 잡기를 실사로 명확하게 시연
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical photorealistic closeup. Adult hand (parent) gently pinching child's nose bridge with thumb and index finger. Child sitting upright, head tilted slightly forward. View from 45-degree angle showing both hand position and posture clearly. Soft natural window light. Clean white or light gray background. Overlay: mint green #2EC4B6 checkmark top-right corner. Small mint rounded label '올바른 자세 ✓' top-left. Medical demonstration photography style. Sharp focus on hand and nose, blurred background. Warm reassuring atmosphere. Professional healthcare tutorial aesthetic.

extra_slides.purpose: 10분 압박 시간을 실감나게 보여주는 타이머 클로즈업
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical photorealistic closeup. Large smartphone timer screen showing 10:00 countdown in bright white digits on black display. Timer held in adult hand, slightly blurred background showing child sitting calmly. Warm indoor lighting. Sharp focus on timer numbers. Overlay: small mint #2EC4B6 rounded label '핵심 행동 ✓' top-left corner. Bottom third: semi-transparent dark overlay bar + white Korean text '최소 10분간 압박' compact sans-serif. Documentary style medical tutorial photography. Natural color grading, soft shadows. Professional healthcare educational aesthetic.
